post_topic: Shipping the Gemini image-gen pipeline: replacing stock photos with auto-generated technical diagrams inside the HITL review queue
image_description:
Single standalone diagram. One concept only. No panels, no grids, no collages. Full bleed 1080x1080px white background.

A left-to-right horizontal pipeline flow diagram with five labeled nodes connected by directional arrows pointing left to right.

Node 1 (leftmost): Rounded rectangle labeled "Post Draft" with a document icon. Navy fill #0A0F1E, white text.

Arrow pointing right from Node 1 to Node 2.

Node 2: Rounded rectangle labeled "Structured Image Prompt" with a small code bracket icon beneath the label. A small callout box in amber #F5A623 floats above this node with the text "Spatial constraints / single diagram enforced". Navy border, white background.

Arrow pointing right from Node 2 to Node 3.

Node 3 (center): Rounded rectangle labeled "Gemini Image-Gen" with the Google Gemini logo mark to the left of the text. Blue fill #5a96ff, white text.

Arrow pointing right from Node 3 to Node 4.

Node 4: Rounded rectangle labeled "HITL Review Queue" with a person icon and a checkmark icon side by side beneath the label. An amber #F5A623 callout box floats above labeled "Copy + Image reviewed together". Navy border, white background.

Arrow pointing right from Node 4 to Node 5.

Node 5 (rightmost): Rounded rectangle labeled "Approved Post" with a green checkmark icon. Navy fill #0A0F1E, white text.

Below the main pipeline, a single line of smaller caption text in dark gray reads: "Every component wired with explicit handoff logic — no manual copy-paste between tools."

Navy #0A0F1E primary elements, blue #5a96ff highlights, amber #F5A623 callouts and important labels. Clean sans-serif font. Real cloud provider logos where relevant. Small text "Kelvin Davis" bottom right corner. Professional LinkedIn infographic style similar to ByteByteGo. White background. No dark backgrounds.
